prose:
A Fukui reactivity analysis was performed on phenol using Density Functional Theory (DFT) at the B3LYP/def2-TZVP level of theory (tier `standard`) in the gas phase. The calculation was run for the neutral molecule with a charge of 0 and a multiplicity of 1.

The results indicate the most likely site for electrophilic attack (electron acceptance) is atom C3, with a Fukui(+) index of 2.10283. The most likely site for nucleophilic attack (electron donation) is the oxygen atom (O1), with a Fukui(-) index of 0.16201.

The calculation was performed with the PySCF backend and converged without any warnings. The integrity checks for charge conservation passed, confirming the reliability of the results.
